title: photinia serratifolia
intro: Photinia serratifolia, also known as Camellia serratifolia or Camellia thea, is a species of evergreen shrub native to China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the Camellia genus. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Photinia serratifolia include reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and alleviating digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Photinia serratifolia typically involve brewing the leaves in hot water or combining them with other herbs to create teas, infusions, or decoctions.
